context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct InfluencerProfile data model structure with the right field types, platform-specific metric shapes, and exact tier classification thresholds as defined in the skill.

checklist.name: handle field type
checklist.description: The handle field is typed as a Record with exactly the keys 'instagram', 'tiktok', and 'youtube', each mapping to string or undefined

checklist.name: niche as array
checklist.description: The niche field is typed as string[] (an array), not a single string

checklist.name: four tier values
checklist.description: The tier field uses exactly the four string literal values: 'nano', 'micro', 'macro', 'mega'

checklist.name: nano threshold
checklist.description: The tier classification function returns 'nano' for follower counts below 10,000

checklist.name: micro threshold
checklist.description: The tier classification function returns 'micro' for follower counts from 10,000 up to (but not including) 100,000

checklist.name: macro threshold
checklist.description: The tier classification function returns 'macro' for follower counts from 100,000 up to (but not including) 1,000,000

checklist.name: per-platform metrics
checklist.description: Instagram and TikTok metrics include both engagementRate and avgViews; YouTube metrics use subscribers (not followers) and avgViews (no engagementRate field)

checklist.name: status values
checklist.description: The status field uses exactly five string literal values: 'prospect', 'contacted', 'active', 'paused', 'blacklisted'

checklist.name: demographics shape
checklist.description: The demographics field contains topCountry (string), ageRange (string), and genderSplit (Record<string, number>)

checklist.name: tags field present
checklist.description: The profile includes a tags field typed as string[]

checklist.name: notes field present
checklist.description: The profile includes a notes field typed as string

checklist.name: four demo influencers
checklist.description: The demo or sample section includes at least 4 influencer instances, each in a different tier (nano, micro, macro, mega)
